title: neottia pinetorum
intro: Neottia pinetorum, also known as the Pine Orchid, is a type of flowering plant in the orchid family. It is native to the mountainous regions of East Asia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Neottia pinetorum include the relief of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and reduce fever. Neottia pinetorum can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various ailments.
